description: Deterministic proof pack for the shared-main compile frontier movement that restored the downstream notify lib proof path.
target_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_asupersync_i1vce6_audit_notify cargo test -p asupersync --lib audit_notify_send_sync_bounds --features test-internals -- --nocapture
check_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_asupersync_i1vce6_check cargo check -p asupersync --lib --features test-internals
first_failure_after: none; downstream notify proof compiled and ran audit_notify_send_sync_bounds
retained_constraints: full-file rustfmt drift remains in src/observability/otel_conformance_tests.rs and was intentionally not rewritten by the umbrella closeout
bv --robot-next and br dep cycles graph checks were degraded by timeout during closeout; br show and targeted proof commands remained usable

smoke_scenarios.description: Verify that the compile-debt umbrella closeout evidence is still reachable from the current main tip and still describes a downstream notify proof that reached the target module.

expected_report_projection.target_command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_asupersync_i1vce6_audit_notify cargo test -p asupersync --lib audit_notify_send_sync_bounds --features test-internals -- --nocapture
expected_report_projection.first_failure_after: none; downstream notify proof compiled and ran audit_notify_send_sync_bounds
